title: clinopodium filiforme
intro: Clinopodium filiforme, also known as Thymus filiformis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly referred to as the narrow-leaved thyme or slender wild thyme. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium filiforme include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Clinopodium filiforme can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal herb.
